evals.prompt: Use $ywc-skill-author to draft a new ywc-data-migration skill. Include a Rationalization Defense section.
evals.expected_output: The generated skill includes domain-specific Rationalization Defense rows for guessing missing migration context, adjacent schema cleanup, overbuilding abstractions, and declaring completion without goal-specific verification. The rows use concrete migration/execution shortcuts rather than generic slogans such as "do not hallucinate", "stay focused", or "run tests".
